cards.prompt: Ковариантность: Func<Mammal> f = () => new Dog(); печать f().Name и типа — обе строки?
cards.code: using System; class Mammal { public virtual string Name => "mammal"; } class Dog : Mammal { public override string Name => "dog"; } Func<Mammal> f = () => new Dog(); Mammal m = f(); Console.WriteLine(m.Name); Console.WriteLine(m.GetType().Name);

cards.prompt: Контравариантность: Action<Cat> = HandleAny(Animal); onCat(new Cat()) — обе строки?
cards.code: using System; class Animal { public string Kind = "animal"; } class Cat : Animal { } void HandleAny(Animal a) => Console.WriteLine("handled: " + a.Kind); Action<Cat> onCat = HandleAny; onCat(new Cat()); Console.WriteLine("contravariance ok");

cards.prompt: Generic-ковариантность: Func<Animal> makeAnimal = makeDog (Func<Dog>); печать Sound и is Dog — обе строки?
cards.code: using System; class Animal { public virtual string Sound => "..."; } class Dog : Animal { public override string Sound => "woof"; } Func<Dog> makeDog = () => new Dog(); Func<Animal> makeAnimal = makeDog; Animal a = makeAnimal(); Console.WriteLine(a.Sound); Console.WriteLine(a is Dog);
